type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher boiler usage;  Contract to receive steam from WWP was terminated May 2016

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Contract ended with Electrical Generation plant.  Facility acted as a cogeneration plant with West Windsor Power.  We received steam and returned condensate.  Once the  contract ended, the facility had to use natural gas boilers to generate steam for evaporative process.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Facility now using natural gas spreadsheet that uses 1.9 lb/10^6 scf emission factor for PM, PM10, PM2.5 (directly from AP-42 Section 1.4). Previous estimation was using 7.6 lb / 10^6 scf for PM, PM10, and PM2.5. Natural gas combustion yields predominantly filterable PM (PM2.5).
